inject.action: docker stop redis container (AOF-persisted, survives stop/start)

fail_closed.note: 401 from auth layer or 503 REDIS_UNAVAILABLE from business layer — both fail-closed; no silent 2xx

known_limitations: No deployment-layer rollback: this drill covers data-plane fail-closed only. Blue-green / canary traffic shifting is not yet implemented.
notes: Persistence-layer drill. Proves fail-closed under degraded Redis + byte-level data survival across the degrade→rollback cycle.
